task.title: Maintain Warranty Eligibility
task.shortdesc: Steps customers and internal teams should follow to ensure warranty eligibility remains valid.

prereq.p: Customer has access to the official service schedule.

step.cmd: Confirm the applicable vehicle model and warranty documentation version.
Ensure scheduled servicing is completed within required time or mileage thresholds.
Document each service event with date, mileage, and performed items.
Escalate deviations through the internal review workflow.

result.p: Warranty discussions become standardized, traceable, and audit-ready across departments.
